name: chrome-mcp
description: Chrome MCP server for browser automation — navigate, screenshot, click, type, extract DOM

scripts.bundle: npm run build && npx esbuild build/index.js --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist/index.cjs --external:puppeteer --banner:js='const __import_meta_url = require("url").pathToFileURL(__filename).href;' --define:import.meta.url=__import_meta_url
